debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
c : α
⊢ slice_over c = @CategoryInContext.Category.slice_over' α C c

failed_attempts:
ext ⟨X, hX⟩
  simp [Category.slice_over, Category.slice_under, Opposite]
  <;>
  aesop

-- Use the fact that the opposite category's slice under is the same as the original category's slice over
    simp only [slice_over, slice_over', slice_under, Opposite]
    <;>
    (try congr 1) <;>
    (try ext) <;>
    (try simp_all [Category.opp, Hom, comp, id]) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try rfl)
  -- The result follows directly from the above equality
  exact h₂

ext ⟨X, f⟩
  <;> simp [slice_over', slice_over, Opposite]
  <;> rfl

have h₁ : @CategoryInContext.Category.slice_over' α C c = @slice_under (Opposite α) (C.opp) c := rfl
  have h₂ : slice_over c = @slice_under (Opposite α) (C.opp) c := rfl
  rw [h₂, h₁]
  <;>
  simp [slice_over, slice_under]
  <;>
  aesop

congr 1
  <;> simp [Opposite]
  <;> ext
  <;> simp [Hom]
  <;> congr 1
  <;> ext
  <;> simp [Hom]
  <;> rfl
